name: beacon
description: Beacon: humans and AI agents talk over a neutral, runtime-agnostic bus. Agents plug in via MCP; the human side reuses a mature IM (Matrix/Element) or a built-in dev console.

scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build:web && npm run platform
scripts.update: git pull && npm install && npm run build:web
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && pm2 restart beacon
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run check:encoding && npm run test && npm run build:web
